name: rspack-bun-migration
description: Complete workflow to migrate frontend microfrontends to Rspack + Bun, adjusting scripts, CI/CD, Docker, lockfiles, and publishing changes to feature branch with PR. Includes troubleshooting for common Bun errors in pipelines and private registries.
author: OpenCode

preparation: Verify repository is frontend with bundler
Confirm base and feature branch names
package_migration: Update package.json scripts to use 'bun run'
Add test:coverage script if needed for CI
Generate yarn.lock with 'bun install --yarn' if CI requires it
Update .gitignore (add package-json.lock, ensure bun.lock and yarn.lock are tracked)
cicd_migration: Update CI commands to use npx -y bun@version
Avoid command chaining with && in template fields
Verify Node version in CI (should be 20+)
docker_migration: Copy package files and install with --frozen-lockfile
Serve dist with nginx in production stage
validation: Ensure yarn.lock exists if CI requires it
Test CI workflow with Bun commands
Verify Dockerfile builds and runs correctly
git_workflow: Commit all changes with descriptive message
Create PR with summary of changes
